wall-mounted tablets\n- Canvas 2D renderer: colored circles for people, zone labels, soft glow effects\n- Time-of-day palette: morning (cool), day (neutral), evening (amber), night (very dim)\n- Auto-dim when house empty for 30+ min; gentle fade-in on person detection\n- Alert mode: pulsing red border + large text + action buttons on fall/security events\n- Morning briefing integration: briefing text shown on first detection, fades after 30 s\n- Reconnect backoff handles WebSocket drops gracefully\n\n**Spatial quick actions (`dashboard/js/quick-actions.js`):**\n- Three.js Raycaster determines target under cursor (person/node/zone/portal/trigger/empty)\n- Context menu component renders appropriate options per target type\n- Per-blob: \"Who is this?\", \"Why?\", \"Follow\" camera, \"Create automation\", \"Mark incorrect\"\n- Per-node: \"Diagnostics\", \"Blink LED\", \"Reposition\", \"Update firmware\", \"Show links\"\n- Per-empty: \"What happened here?\", \"Add trigger zone\", settings, help topics, events\n- Navigate time: \"last night 2am\", \"yesterday kitchen\", \"this morning\"\n- Execute commands: \"update all nodes\", \"re-baseline kitchen\", \"arm security\"\n- overnight anomalies → system health → predictions → learning progress\n- Degenerate case: \"All quiet last night. All systems healthy.\"\n- Stored in `briefings` SQLite table (one per day per person)\n- REST API: `GET /api/briefing`, `GET /api/briefing/current`\n- Dashboard: card overlay on first open, dismissible, slides away after 10 s\n\n**Guided troubleshooting (`internal/guidedtroubleshoot/`, `dashboard/js/troubleshoot.js`):**\n- Trigger conditions: detection quality drops, repeated setting changes, node offline >2 h\n- Repeated-edit detection: per-key counter in memory; hint delivered in `GET /api/settings` response as `\"repeated_edit_hint\": true`\n- Proactive diagnostic flow: check connectivity → show link health → suggest repositioning → offer re-baseline\n- First-time feature tooltips shown once, dismissed on click, stored in `localStorage`\n- Post-feedback explanations in timeline after incorrect/missed detection feedback\n\n**Mobile-responsive expert mode (`dashboard/js/mobile.js` + CSS):**\n- Touch orbit (one finger), pan (two fingers), pinch-zoom (two fingers)\n- FXAA anti-aliasing replaces MSAA on mobile (better performance on low-power GPUs)\n- Hamburger menu for toolbar panels on small screens\n- Viewport meta tag with `viewport-fit=cover` for notch-aware layout\n- CSS Grid layout collapses gracefully on narrow viewports\n\n**Fleet status page (`dashboard/fleet.html`, `dashboard/js/fleet-page.js`):**\n- Full table with sortable columns: Name, MAC, Role, Position (fly-to), Firmware, RSSI, Status, Uptime, Actions\n- OTA progress bar per node during updates (PENDING → DOWNLOADING → REBOOTING → VERIFIED / FAILED)\n- Bulk actions: Update All (rolling OTA), Re-baseline All, Export Config, Import Config\n- Camera fly-to: clicking position coordinates in table jumps 3D camera to that node\n- Responsive layout works on both desktop and standalone ambient.html, always enable\n        // For main dashboard, check hash\n        if (window.location.pathname.endsWith('/ambient.html') ||\n            window.location.pathname === '/ambient') {\n            enableAmbientMode();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const hash = window.location.hash.slice(1);\n        if (hash === 'ambient') {\n });\n\n            // Set up callbacks\n            renderer.setAlertClickCallback(handleAlertClick);\n            renderer.setUserActivityCallback(resetDimTimer);\n        }\n\n        // Initialize first detection today\n        checkAndShowBriefing();\n\n        console.log('[Ambient Mode] Enabled');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Disable ambient mode\n     */\n    function disableAmbientMode() {\n        if (!isActive) return;\n\n        isActive = false;\n        document.body.classList.remove('ambient-mode');\n\n        // Disconnect WebSocket\n        disconnectWebSocket();\n\n        // Destroy renderer\n        if (renderer) {\n            renderer.destroy();\n            renderer = null;\n        }\n\n        // Remove ambient UI\n        const ambientContainer = console.log('[Ambient Mode] Disabled');\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // UI Creation\n    // ============================================\n\n    /**\n     * Create ambient mode UI\n     */\n    function createAmbientUI() {\n        // Check if already exists\n        if (document.getElementById('ambient-container')) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n      document.body.appendChild(container);\n\n        canvas = document.getElementById('ambient-canvas');\n\n        // Set up event listeners for route changes\n /**\n     * Start time-of-day updater\n     */\n    function startTimeOfDayUpdater() {\n        updateTimeOfDay();\n        timeOfDayTimer = setInterval(updateTimeOfDay, 60000); // Check every minute\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Stop all timers\n     */\n    function stopUpdates() {\n        if (timeOfDayTimer) {\n            clearInterval(timeOfDayTimer);\n            timeOfDayTimer = null;\n        }\n        if (updateTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(updateTimer);\n            updateTimer = null;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Update time-of-day theme\n     */\n    function updateTimeOfDay() {\n        if (!isActive) return;\n\n        const hour = new Date().getHours();\n        let period = 'night';\n\n        for (const [key, range] of Object.entries(TIME_PERIODS)) {\n            if (range.start <= range.end) {\n                // Normal period (e.g., morning: 6-10)\n                if (hour >= range.start && hour < range.end) {\n                    period = key;\n                    break;\n                }\n            } else {\n                // Overnight period (e.g., night: 22-6)\n                if (hour >= range.start || hour < range.end) {\n                    period = key;\n                    break;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Remove all time periods\n        document.body.classList.remove('time-morning', 'time-day', 'time-evening', 'time-night');\n\n        // Add current period\n        document.body.classList.add('time-' + period);\n\n        // Update renderer time period\n        if (renderer) {\n            // Force a render to update background color\n            renderer.render();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // WebSocket Connection\n    // ============================================\n\n    /**\n     * Connect to WebSocket for real-time updates\n     */\n    function connectWebSocket() {\n        // Disconnect existing connection\n        if (ws) {\n            ws.close();\n        }\n\n        // Determine WebSocket protocol\n        const wsProtocol = window.location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss:' : 'ws:';\n        const wsHost = window.location.host;\n        const wsUrl = `${wsProtocol}//${wsHost}/ws/dashboard`;\n\n        console.log('[Ambient Mode] Connecting WebSocket:', wsUrl);\n\n        ws = new WebSocket(wsUrl);\n\n        ws.onopen = function() {\n            console.log('[Ambient Mode] WebSocket connected');\n            updateConnectionStatus(true);\n\n            // Clear reconnect timer\n            if (wsReconnectTimer) {\n                clearTimeout(wsReconnectTimer);\n                wsReconnectTimer = null;\n            }\n        };\n\n        ws.onmessage = function(event) {\n            try {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                handleWebSocketMessage(data);\n            } catch (e) {\n                console.error('[Ambient Mode] Error parsing WebSocket message:', e);\n            }\n        };\n\n        ws.onclose = function(event) {\n            console.log('[Ambient Mode] WebSocket disconnected:', event.code, event.reason);\n            updateConnectionStatus(false);\n\n            // Attempt to reconnect\n            if (isActive) {\n                const delay = 5000; // 5 seconds\n                wsReconnectTimer = setTimeout(connectWebSocket, delay);\n            }\n        };\n\n        ws.onerror = function(error) {\n            console.error('[Ambient Mode] WebSocket error:', error);\n            updateConnectionStatus(false);\n        };\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Disconnect WebSocket\n     */\n    function disconnectWebSocket() {\n        if (ws) {\n            ws.close();\n            ws = null;\n        }\n\n        if (wsReconnectTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(wsReconnectTimer);\n            wsReconnectTimer = null;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Update connection status indicator\n     */\n    function updateConnectionStatus(connected) {\n        const statusDot = document.getElementById('ambient-status-dot');\n        const statusText = document.getElementById('ambient-status-text');\n\n        if (statusDot) {\n            if (connected) {\n                statusDot.className = 'ambient-status-dot online';\n            } else {\n                statusDot.className = 'ambient-status-dot';\n                statusDot.style.background = '#ff3b30';\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (statusText) {\n            statusText.textContent = connected ? 'Connected' : 'Reconnecting...';\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Handle WebSocket message\n     */\n    function handleWebSocketMessage(data) {\n        // Handle snapshot message (first message on connect)\n        if (data.type === 'snapshot') {\n            // Full snapshot\n            if (data.zones) currentState.zones = data.zones;\n            if (data.blobs) currentState.blobs = data.blobs;\n            if (data.portals) currentState.portals = data.portals;\n            if (data.nodes) currentState.nodes = data.nodes;\n            if (data.events) currentState.alerts = data.events.filter(e =>\n                e.type === 'alert' || e.type === 'fall_alert' || e.type === 'anomaly'\n            );\n            if (data.security_mode !== undefined) currentState.securityMode = data.security_mode;\n\n            // Update node counts\n            currentState.nodesOnline = currentState.nodes.filter(n => n.status === 'online').length;\n            currentState.nodesTotal = currentState.nodes.length;\n\n            currentState.lastUpdate = new Date();\n\n            // Update renderer state\n            if (renderer) {\n                renderer.updateState(currentState);\n            }\n\n            // Update UI\n            updateStatus();\n            checkAlerts();\n\n            // Trigger first detection for briefing\n            if (currentState.blobs.length > 0 && window.SpaxelAmbientBriefing) {\n                window.SpaxelAmbientBriefing.onFirstDetection();\n            }\n\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Handle loc_update messages (event-driven blob updates)\n        if (data.type === 'loc_update') {\n            if (data.blobs) {\n                currentState.blobs = data.blobs;\n            }\n            currentState.lastUpdate = new Date();\n\n            // Update renderer state\n            if (renderer) {\n                renderer.updateState(currentState);\n            }\n\n            // Update UI\n            updateStatus();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Handle event-driven messages\n        if (data.type === 'alert' || data.type === 'anomaly_detected' || data.type === 'fall_alert') {\n            // Add to alerts\n            const exists = currentState.alerts.some(a => a.id === data.id);\n            if (!exists) {\n                currentState.alerts.push(data);\n            }\n            currentState.lastUpdate = new Date();\n            checkAlerts();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Handle system_mode_change for security mode\n        if (data.type === 'system_mode_change') {\n            if (data.security_mode !== undefined) {\n                currentState.securityMode = data.security_mode;\n            }\n            updateStatus();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Handle delta messages (no type field - incremental updates)\n        if (!data.type) {\n            if (data.blobs) {\n                currentState.blobs = data.blobs;\n            }\n            if (data.zones) {\n                currentState.zones = data.zones;\n            }\n            if (data.portals) {\n                currentState.portals = data.portals;\n            }\n            if (data.nodes) {\n                currentState.nodes = data.nodes;\n                currentState.nodesOnline = currentState.nodes.filter(n => n.status === 'online').length;\n                currentState.nodesTotal = currentState.nodes.length;\n            }\n            if (data.events && data.events.length > 0) {\n                // Add new alerts\n                data.events.forEach(event => {\n                    if (event.type === 'alert' || event.type === 'fall_alert' || event.type === 'anomaly') {\n                        // Check if alert already exists\n                        const exists = currentState.alerts.some(a => a.id === event.id);\n                        if (!exists) {\n                            currentState.alerts.push(event);\n                        }\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n            // Handle security_mode in delta\n            if (data.security_mode !== undefined) {\n                currentState.securityMode = data.security_mode;\n            }\n\n            currentState.lastUpdate = new Date();\n\n            // Update renderer state\n            if (renderer) {\n                renderer.updateState(currentState);\n            }\n\n            // Update UI\n            updateStatus();\n            checkAlerts();\n        }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Status Updates\n    // ============================================\n\n    /**\n     * Update status bar\n     */\n    function updateStatus() {\n        const statusText = document.getElementById('ambient-status-text');\n        const timeDisplay = document.getElementById('ambient-time');\n        const nodesDisplay = document.getElementById('ambient-nodes');\n        const secureMessage = document.getElementById('ambient-secure');\n\n        if (statusText) {\n            // Determine status based on alerts and security mode\n            if (currentState.alerts.length > 0) {\n                statusText.textContent = 'Alert active';\n            } else if (currentState.securityMode) {\n                statusText.textContent = 'Security armed';\n            } else {\n                statusText.textContent = 'All secure';\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (timeDisplay) {\n            const now = new Date();\n            timeDisplay.textContent = now.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', {\n                hour: 'numeric',\n                minute: '2-digit',\n                hour12: true\n            });\n        }\n\n        if (nodesDisplay) {\n            nodesDisplay.textContent = `${currentState.nodesOnline}/${currentState.nodesTotal} nodes`;\n        }\n\n        // Show/hide \"All Secure\" message\n        if (secureMessage) {\n            const hasPeople = currentState.blobs.length > 0;\n            const hasAlerts = currentState.alerts.length > 0;\n\n            if (!hasPeople && !hasAlerts && !isDimmed()) {\n                secureMessage.style.display = 'block';\n            } else {\n                secureMessage.style.display = 'none';\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    function isDimmed() {\n        return renderer && document.getElementById('ambient-canvas')?.style.filter.includes('brightness(0.4)');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Check for alerts and show/hide alert mode\n     */\n    function checkAlerts() {\n        if (currentState.alerts.length > 0) {\n            // Show alert mode in renderer\n            if (renderer) {\n                const latestAlert = currentState.alerts[0];\n                renderer.enterAlertMode(latestAlert);\n            }\n        } else {\n            // Hide alert mode\n            if (renderer) {\n                renderer.exitAlertMode();\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Handle alert click/acknowledge\n     */\n    function handleAlertClick(alert) {\n        // Dismiss the alert\n        currentState.alerts = [];\n        checkAlerts();\n\n        // In a real implementation, this would call an API to acknowledge the alert\n        // For now, just show a toast\n        showToast('Alert acknowledged', 'info');\n\n        // Check for fall alerts - POST to acknowledge endpoint\n        if (alert.type === 'fall_alert' && alert.id) {\n            acknowledgeAlert(alert.id, 'fall');\n        } else if (alert.type === 'anomaly' && alert.id) {\n            acknowledgeAlert(alert.id, 'anomaly');\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Acknowledge an alert via API\n     */\n    async function acknowledgeAlert(alertId, alertType) {\n        try {\n            let endpoint = `/api/anomalies/${alertId}/acknowledge`;\n            if (alertType === 'fall') {\n                endpoint = `/api/fall/${alertId}/acknowledge`;\n            }\n\n            const response = await fetch(endpoint, {\n                method: 'POST'\n            });\n\n            if (response.ok) {\n                console.log('[Ambient Mode] Alert acknowledged:', alertId);\n            } else {\n                console.warn('[Ambient Mode] Failed to acknowledge alert:', alertId);\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[Ambient Mode] Error acknowledging alert:', error);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Reset the dim timer (called on user activity)\n     */\n    function resetDimTimer() {\n        if (renderer) {\n            renderer.wakeFromDim();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Morning Briefing\n    // ============================================\n\n    /**\n     * Check and show morning briefing\n     */\n    async function checkAndShowBriefing() {\n        if (!window.SpaxelAmbientBriefing) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Check if briefing should be shown\n        if (await window.SpaxelAmbientBriefing.shouldShowToday()) {\n            window.SpaxelAmbientBriefing.fetchAndShow();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Helper Functions\n    // ============================================\n\n    /**\n     * Show toast notification\n     */\n    function showToast(message, type = 'info') {\n        if (window.showToast) {\n            window.showToast(message, type);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Fallback toast\n        const toast = document.createElement('div');\n        toast.className = `toast ${type}`;\n        toast.textContent = message;\n        toast.style.cssText = `\n            position: fixed;\n            top: 20px;\n            left: 50%;\n            transform: translateX(-50%);\n            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);\n            color: white;\n            padding: 12px 20px;\n            border-radius: 8px;\n            z-index: 200;\n        `;\n\n        document.body.appendChild(toast);\n\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            toast.style.animation = 'fadeOut 0.3s ease-out forwards';\n            setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 300);\n        }, 3000);\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Public API\n    // ============================================\n    window.SpaxelAmbientMode = {\n        init: init,\n        enable: enableAmbientMode,\n        disable: disableAmbientMode,\n        isActive: () => isActive,\n        setAmbientZone: (zoneId) => {\n            config.ambientZone = zoneId;\n            if (renderer) {\n                renderer.setAmbientZone(zoneId);\n            }\n        },\n        refresh: () => {\n            // Trigger a render\n            if (renderer) {\n                renderer.render();\n            }\n        }\n    };\n\n    // Auto-initialize\n    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);\n    } else {\n        init();\n    }\n\n    console.log('[Ambient Mode] Module loaded');\n})();\n","numLines":703,"startLine":1,"totalLines":703}}}

       },\n51\t\n52\t        /**\n53\t         * Show the morning briefing\n54\t         * @param {Object} briefingData - Briefing content from API\n55\t         */\n56\t        show(briefingData)                briefingTimer = null;\n94\t            }\n95\t\n96\t            // Mark as shown for today\n97\t            markAsShown();\n98\t\n99\t            if (onDismiss) {\n100\t                onDismiss();\n101\t            }\n102\t\n103\t            console.log('[AmbientBriefing] Dismissed');\n104\t        },\n105\t\n106\t        /**\n107\t         * Check if briefing should be shown today\n108\t         * @returns {Promise<boolean>} - True if briefing should be shown\n109\t         */\n110\t        async shouldShowToday() {\n111\t            // Check if already shown today\n112\t            if (hasShownToday) {\n113\t                return false;\n114\t            }\n115\t\n116\t            const lastShown = localStorage.getItem(LOCAL_STORAGE_KEY);\n117\t            const }\n123\t\n124\t            // Check if it's morning\n125\t            const hour = new Date().getHours();\n126\t            if (hour < MORNING_START_HOUR || hour >= BRIEFING_END_HOUR) {\n127\t                return false;\n128\t            }\n129\t\n130\t            return true;\n131\t        },\n132\t\n133\t        /**\n134\t         * Fetch and show briefing from API\n135\t         */\n136\t        async fetchAndShow() {\n137\t            if (!(await this.shouldShowToday())) {\n138\t                return;\n139\t            }\n140\t\n141\t            try {\n142\t                const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];\n143\t                let briefingData;\n144\t\n145\t                if (onFetchBriefing) {\n146\t                    // Use custom fetch function\n147\t                    briefingData = await onFetchBriefing(today);\n148\t                } else {\n149\t                    // Default fetch from API\n150\t                    const response = await fetch(`/api/briefing?date=${today}`);\n151\t                    if (!response.ok) {\n152\t                        throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);\n153\t                    }\n154\t                    briefingData = await response.json();\n155\t                }\n156\t\n157\t                this.show(briefingData);\n158\t            } catch (error) {\n159\t                console.error('[AmbientBriefing] Error fetching briefing:', error);\n160\t            }\n161\t        },\n162\t\n163\t        /**\n164\t         * Set dismiss callback\n165\t         * @param /**\n172\t         * Set fetch briefing callback\n173\t         * @param {Function} callback - Function to fetch briefing data\n174\t         */\n175\t        setOnFetchBriefing(callback) {\n176\t            onFetchBriefing = callback;\n177\t        },\n178\t\n179\t        /**\n180\t         * Trigger first detection (call when first person detected)\n181\t         */\n182\t        onFirstDetection() {\n183\t            if (isFirstDetectionToday && !hasShownToday) {\n184\t                isFirstDetectionToday = false;\n185\t                this.fetchAndShow();\n186\t            }\n187\t        },\n188\t\n189\t        /**\n190\t         * Reset the daily flag (for testing)\n191\t         */\n192\t        resetDailyFlag() {\n193\t ============================================\n200\t    // Internal Functions\n201\t    // ============================================\n202\t\n203\t    function ensureBriefingElement() {\n204\t document.getElementById('ambient-briefing');\n210\t        if (briefingElement) {\n211\t            return;\n212\t        }\n213\t\n214\t        // Create briefing element\n215\t        briefingElement = document.createElement('div');\n216\t        briefingElement.id = 'ambient-briefing';\n217\t        briefingElement.className = 'ambient-briefing hidden';\n218\t        briefingElement.innerHTML = `\n219\t            <div class=\"ambient-briefing-content\">\n220\t                <div class=\"ambient-briefing-greeting\" id=\"briefing-greeting\"></div>\n221\t                <div id=\"briefing-content\" class=\"ambient-briefing-sections\"></div>\n222\t                <button class=\"ambient-briefing-dismiss\" id=\"briefing-dismiss\">Got it</button>\n223\t            </div>\n224\t        `;\n225\t\n226\t        document.body.appendChild(briefingElement);\n227\t    }\n228\t\n229\t    function setupEventListeners() {\n230\t        // Dismiss button\n231\t        const dismissBtn = document.getElementById('briefing-dismiss');\n232\t        if (dismissBtn) {\n233\t            // Remove any existing listeners to avoid duplicates\n234\t            const newBtn = dismissBtn.cloneNode(true);\n235\t            dismissBtn.parentNode.replaceChild(newBtn, dismissBtn);\n236\t\n237\t            newBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n238\t                AmbientBriefing.dismiss();\n239\t            });\n240\t        }\n241\t\n242\t        // Dismiss on tap/click outside content\n243\t        if (briefingElement) {\n244\t            briefingElement.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n245\t                if (e.target === briefingElement) {\n246\t                    AmbientBriefing.dismiss();\n247\t                }\n248\t            });\n249\t        }\n250\t    }\n251\t\n252\t    function populateBriefing(data) {\n253\t        const greetingEl = document.getElementById('briefing-greeting');\n254\t        const contentEl = document.getElementById('briefing-content');\n255\t\n256\t        if (!greetingEl || !contentEl) {\n257\t            return;\n258\t        }\n259\t\n260\t        // Set greeting based on time of day\n261\t        const hour = new Date().getHours();\n262\t        let greeting = 'Good morning';\n263\t        if (hour < 12) {\n264\t            greeting = 'Good morning';\n265\t        } else if (hour < 17) {\n266\t            greeting = 'Good afternoon';\n267\t        } else {\n268\t            greeting = 'Good evening';\n269\t        }\n270\t\n271\t        greetingEl.textContent = greeting;\n272\t\n273\t        // Parse briefing content\n274\t        const sections = parseBriefingContent(data);\n275\t        contentEl.innerHTML = sections;\n276\t    }\n277\t\n278\t    function parseBriefingContent(data) {\n279\t        let html = '';\n280\t\n281\t        // Handle different briefing data formats\n282\t        if (data.content) {\n283\t            // Text content - parse for sections\n284\t            const lines = data.content.split('\\n').filter(line => line.trim());\n285\t\n286\t            // Group lines into sections\n287\t            let currentSection = null;\n288\t            let sectionContent = [];\n289\t\n290\t            lines.forEach(line => {\n291\t                // Check if this is a section header\n292\t                if (line.includes(':') && line.length < 50) {\n293\t                    // Save previous section\n294\t                    if (currentSection && sectionContent.length > 0) {\n295\t                        html += createBriefingSection(currentSection, sectionContent.join('<br>'));\n296\t                    }\n297\t                    // Start new section\n298\t                    const parts = line.split(':');\n299\t                    currentSection = parts[0].trim();\n300\t                    sectionContent = [parts.slice(1).join(':').trim()];\n301\t                } else if (currentSection) {\n302\t                    sectionContent.push(line);\n303\t                } else {\n304\t                    // No section yet, add as general content\n305\t                    if (!currentSection) {\n306\t                        currentSection = 'Summary';\n307\t                        sectionContent = [];\n308\t                    }\n309\t                    sectionContent.push(line);\n310\t                }\n311\t            });\n312\t\n313\t            // Don't forget the last section\n314\t            if (currentSection && sectionContent.length > 0) {\n315\t                html += createBriefingSection(currentSection, sectionContent.join('<br>'));\n316\t            }\n317\t        } else {\n318\t            // Structured data - extract key information\n319\t            if (data.sleep_summary) {\n320\t                html += createBriefingSection('Sleep Summary', data.sleep_summary);\n321\t            }\n322\t\n323\t            if (data.departures && data.departures.length > 0) {\n324\t                const departuresText = data.departures.map(d =>\n325\t                    `${d.person}: likely leaves at ${d.time}`\n326\t                ).join('<br>');\n327\t                html += createBriefingSection('Expected Departures', departuresText);\n328\t            }\n329\t\n330\t            if (data.system_status) {\n331\t                html += createBriefingSection('System Status', data.system_status);\n332\t            }\n333\t\n334\t            if (data.accuracy) {\n335\t                html += createBriefingSection('Accuracy', data.accuracy);\n336\t            }\n337\t        }\n338\t\n339\t        return html || '<div class=\"ambient-briefing-section\">No briefing data available</div>';\n340\t    }\n341\t\n342\t    function createBriefingSection(label, content) {\n343\t        return `\n344\t            <div class=\"ambient-briefing-section\">\n345\t                <div class=\"ambient-briefing-section-label\">${label}</div>\n346\t                <div class=\"ambient-briefing-section-value\">${content}</div>\n347\t            </div>\n348\t        `;\n349\t      /**\n         * Initialize the morning briefing module\n         */\n        init() {\n            // Create briefing element if it doesn't exist\n            ensureBriefingElement();\n\n colors = TIME_COLORS[period];\n353\t\n354\t        // Draw background\n355\t        drawBackground(ctx, width, height, colors);\n356\t\n357\t        // Check for alert mode\n358\t        const canvas\n362\t        }\n363\t\n364\t        // Calculate floor plan bounds\n365\t        const bounds = calculateBounds(width, height);\n366\t\n367\t        // Draw zones (room outlines)\n368\t        drawZones(ctx, bounds, colors);\n369\t\n370\t        // Draw portals\n371\t        drawPortals(ctx, bounds, colors);\n372\t\n373\t        // Draw nodes\n374\t        drawNodes(ctx, bounds, colors);\n375\t\n376\t        // Draw people (with lerp-interpolated positions)\n377\t        drawPeople(ctx, bounds, colors);\n378\t\n379\t        // Draw system status indicator (top-left)\n380\t        drawSystemStatus(ctx, colors);\n381\t\n382\t        // Draw time display (top-right)\n383\t        drawTimeDisplay(ctx, width, colors);\n384\t    }\n385\t\n386\t    function drawBackground(ctx, }\n391\t\n392\t    function drawAlertMode(ctx, width, height) {\n393\t        // Pulsing red background for alert mode\n394\t        const pulseIntensity = alertPulseState ? 1.0 : 0.7;\n395\t\n396\t        // Create gradient background\n397\t        const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(\n398\t            width / 2, height / 2, 0,\n399\t            width / 2, height / 2, Math.max(width, height) / 2\n400\t        );\n401\t        gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(220, 38, 38, ${pulseIntensity})`);\n402\t        gradient.addColorStop(1, `rgba(127, 29, 29, ${pulseIntensity * 0.8})`);\n403\t\n404\t        ctx.fillStyle = gradient;\n405\t        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);\n406\t\n407\t        // Draw pulsing border\n408\t        const borderWidth = 8 + (pulseIntensity * 4); // 8-12px\n409\t        ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${pulseIntensity})`;\n410\t        ctx.lineWidth = borderWidth;\n411\t        ctx.strokeRect(0, 0, width, height);\n412\t\n413\t        // Draw alert text\n414\t        const alert = currentState.alerts[0];\n415\t        if (alert) {\n416\t            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';\n417\t            ctx.font = 'bold 48px -apple-system, // Button background with glow\n436\t            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${0.9 + pulseIntensity * 0.1})`;\n437\t            ctx.shadowColor = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5)';\n438\t            ctx.shadowBlur = 10;\n439\t            ctx.beginPath();\n440\t            ctx.roundRect(buttonX, buttonY, buttonWidth, buttonHeight, 8);\n441\t            ctx.fill();\n442\t            ctx.shadowBlur 2, buttonY + buttonHeight / 2);\n447\t        }\n448\t    }\n449\t\n450\t    function formatAlertMessage(alert) {\n451\t        if (alert.type === 'fall_alert') {\n452\t            const person =     scale: size / 10, // 10 meters default\n471\t                minX: 0,\n472\t                minY: 0\n473\t            };\n474\t        }\n475\t\n476\t        let minX = Infinity, minY = Add margin\n492\t        const marginMeters = 1; // 1 meter margin\n493\t        minX -= marginMeters;\n494\t        minY -= marginMeters;\n495\t        maxX += marginMeters;\n496\t        maxY += marginMeters;\n497\t\n498\t        const floorWidth = maxX - minX;\n499\t        const floorHeight = maxY - minY;\n500\t\n501\t        // Calculate scale to fit canvas\n502\t        const scaleX = (canvasWidth - config.margin * 2) / floorWidth;\n503\t        const scaleY = (canvasHeight - config.margin * 2) / floorHeight;\n504\t        const scale = Math.min(scaleX, scaleY, config.scale);\n505\t\n506\t        // Calculate centered bounds\n507\t        const boundsWidth = floorWidth * scale;\n508\t        const boundsHeight = floorHeight * scale;\n509\t        const boundsX = (canvasWidth - boundsWidth) / 2;\n510\t        const boundsY = (canvasHeight - boundsHeight) / 2;\n511\t\n512\t        return {\n513\t            x: boundsX,\n514\t            y: boundsY,\n515\t            width: boundsWidth,\n516\t            height: boundsHeight,\n517\t            scale: scale,\n518\t            minX: minX,\n519\t            minY: minY\n520\t        };\n521\t    }\n522\t\n523\t    function worldToScreen(wx, wy, bounds) {\n524\t        return {\n525\t            x: bounds.x + (wx - bounds.minX) * bounds.scale,\n526\t            y: bounds.y + (wy - bounds.minY) * bounds.scale\n527\t        };\n528\t    }\n529\t\n530\t    function drawZones(ctx, bounds, colors) {\n531\t        currentState.zones.forEach(zone => {\n532\t            const x = centerY);\n558\t\n559\t            if (count > 0) {\n560\t                ctx.font = '12px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n561\t                ctx.fillText(`(${count})`, centerX,     });\n584\t    }\n585\t\n586\t    function drawNodes(ctx, bounds, colors) {\n587\t        currentState.nodes.forEach(node => {\n588\t            const x = node.pos_x || node.PosX || 0;\n589\t }\n600\t\n601\t    function drawPeople(ctx, bounds, colors) {\n602\t        currentState.blobs.forEach(blob => {\n603\t            // Get current position (with lerp interpolation)\n604\t pos.z = lerp(pos.z, target.z, LERP_FACTOR);\n617\t\n618\t                // Update the currentPositions map with the lerped position\n619\t                currentPositions.set(blob.id, { ...pos return start + (end - start) * factor;\n766\t    }\n767\t\n768\t    function getPersonColor(personName) {\n769\t        // Generate consistent color from name\n770\t        let hash = 0;\n771\t        for (let i = 0; i < personName.length; i++) {\n772\t            hash = personName.charCodeAt(i) + ((hash << 5) - hash);\n773\t        }\n774\t        const hue = Math.abs(hash) % 360;\n775\t     init(canvasElement, rendererConfig = {}) {\n            canvas = canvasElement;\n            ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n\n            // Apply configuration\n            Object.assign(config, console.log('[AmbientRenderer] Initialized');\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Update the current state\n         * @param {Object} state - New state from WebSocket\n         */\n        updateState(state) {\n            // Update target positions for lerp\n            if (state.blobs) {\n                state.blobs.forEach(blob => {\n                    const target = {\n                        x: blob.x,\n                        y: blob.y,\n                        z: blob.z || 0\n                    };\n                    targetPositions.set(blob.id, target);\n\n                    // Initialize current position if this is a new blob\n                    if (!currentPositions.has(blob.id)) {\n                        currentPositions.set(blob.id, { ...target });\n                    }\n                });\n\n                // Remove blobs that are no longer tracked\n                const trackedIds = new Set(state.blobs.map(b => b.id));\n                for (const id of currentPositions.keys()) {\n                    if (!trackedIds.has(id)) {\n                        currentPositions.delete(id);\n                        targetPositions.delete(id);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            // Update state\n            if (state.zones) currentState.zones = state.zones;\n            if (state.portals) currentState.portals = state.portals;\n            if (state.nodes) currentState.nodes = state.nodes;\n            if (state.alerts) currentState.alerts = state.alerts;\n            if (state.security_mode !== undefined) currentState.securityMode = state.security_mode;\n            currentState.lastUpdate = new Date();\n\n            // Check for alerts to update system health\n            updateSystemHealth();\n\n            // Check for presence in ambient zone (for auto-dim)\n            checkAmbientZonePresence();\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Set the ambient zone for auto-dim detection\n         * @param {string} zoneId - Zone ID to monitor for presence\n         */\n        setAmbientZone(zoneId) {\n            config.ambientZone = zoneId;\n            console.log('[AmbientRenderer] Ambient zone set to:', zoneId);\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Set alert click callback\n         * @param {Function} callback - Function to call when alert is clicked\n         */\n        setAlertClickCallback(callback) {\n            onAlertClick = callback;\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Set user activity callback\n         * @param {Function} callback - Function to call on user activity\n         */\n        setUserActivityCallback(callback) {\n            onUserActivity = callback;\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Manually trigger a render\n         */\n        render() {\n            if (ctx && canvas) {\n                renderFrame();\n            }\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Enter alert mode\n         * @param {Object} alert - Alert data\n         */\n        enterAlertMode(alert) {\n            currentState.alerts = [alert];\n            startAlertPulse();\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Exit alert mode\n         */\n        exitAlertMode() {\n            currentState.alerts = [];\n            stopAlertPulse();\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Wake from dim mode\n         */\n        wakeFromDim() {\n            if (isDimmed) {\n                isDimmed = false;\n                canvas.style.filter = 'brightness(1)';\n                canvas.style.transition = 'filter 0.3s ease';\n                resetDimTimer();\n            }\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Get current time period\n         * @returns {string} - 'morning', 'day', 'evening', or 'night'\n         */\n        getTimePeriod() {\n            const hour = new Date().getHours();\n            if (hour >= 6 && hour < 10) return 'morning';\n            if (hour >= 10 && hour < 18) return 'day';\n            if (hour >= 18 && hour < 22) return 'evening';\n            return 'night';\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Clean up resources\n         */\n        destroy() {\n            stopRenderLoop();\n            stopAlertPulse();\n            if (dimTimer) {\n                clearTimeout(dimTimer);\n                dimTimer = null;\n            }\n            window.removeEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);\n            console.log('[AmbientRenderer] Destroyed');\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Stop the render loop (for testing)\n         */\n        stopRenderLoop() {\n            stopRenderLoop();\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Start the render loop (for testing)\n         */\n        startRenderLoop() {\n            startRenderLoop();\n        },\n\n        // Testing/internal methods\n        _getCurrentState,\n        _getCurrentPositions,\n        _getTargetPositions,\n        _getAlertPulseState,\n        _getRenderCallCount,\n        _resetRenderCallCount,\n        _enterDimMode,\n        _checkAmbientZonePresence\n    };\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Internal Functions\n    // ============================================\n\n    function resizeCanvas() {\n        if (!canvas) return;\n\n        const container = canvas.parentElement;\n        if (!container) return;\n\n        const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();\n        const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;\n\n        canvas.width = rect.width * dpr;\n        canvas.height = rect.height * dpr;\n        canvas.style.width = rect.width + 'px';\n        canvas.style.height = rect.height + 'px';\n\n        if (ctx) {\n            ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);\n        }\n    }\n\n    function startRenderLoop() {\n        stopRenderLoop();\n\n        function renderLoop(timestamp) {\n            // Throttle to 2 Hz (500ms between frames)\n            if (timestamp - lastRenderTime >= RENDER_INTERVAL_MS) {\n                lastRenderTime = timestamp;\n                renderFrame();\n            }\n            renderTimer = requestAnimationFrame(renderLoop);\n        }\n\n        renderTimer = requestAnimationFrame(renderLoop);\n    }\n\n    function stopRenderLoop() {\n        if (renderTimer) {\n            cancelAnimationFrame(renderTimer);\n            renderTimer = null;\n        }\n    }\n\n    function renderFrame() {\n        if (!ctx || !canvas) return;\n\n        renderCallCount++; // Track render calls for testing\n\n        const width = canvas.width / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);\n        const height = canvas.height / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);\n\n        // Clear canvas\n        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);\n\n        // Get current time period and colors\n        const period = AmbientRenderer.getTimePeriod();\n        const colors = TIME_COLORS[period];\n\n        // Draw background\n        drawBackground(ctx, width, height, colors);\n\n        // Check for alert mode\n        const hasActiveAlert = currentState.alerts.length > 0;\n        if (hasActiveAlert) {\n            drawAlertMode(ctx, width, height);\n            return; // Alert mode takes over the entire canvas\n        }\n\n        // Calculate floor plan bounds\n        const bounds = calculateBounds(width, height);\n\n        // Draw zones (room outlines)\n        drawZones(ctx, bounds, colors);\n\n        // Draw portals\n        drawPortals(ctx, bounds, colors);\n\n        // Draw nodes\n        drawNodes(ctx, bounds, colors);\n\n        // Draw people (with lerp-interpolated positions)\n        drawPeople(ctx, bounds, colors);\n\n        // Draw system status indicator (top-left)\n        drawSystemStatus(ctx, colors);\n\n        // Draw time display (top-right)\n        drawTimeDisplay(ctx, width, colors);\n    }\n\n    function drawBackground(ctx, width, height, colors) {\n        // Solid background color based on time of day\n        ctx.fillStyle = colors.bg;\n        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);\n    }\n\n    function drawAlertMode(ctx, width, height) {\n        // Pulsing red background for alert mode\n        const pulseIntensity = alertPulseState ? 1.0 : 0.7;\n\n        // Create gradient background\n        const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(\n            width / 2, height / 2, 0,\n            width / 2, height / 2, Math.max(width, height) / 2\n        );\n        gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(220, 38, 38, ${pulseIntensity})`);\n        gradient.addColorStop(1, `rgba(127, 29, 29, ${pulseIntensity * 0.8})`);\n\n        ctx.fillStyle = gradient;\n        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);\n\n        // Draw pulsing border\n        const borderWidth = 8 + (pulseIntensity * 4); // 8-12px\n        ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${pulseIntensity})`;\n        ctx.lineWidth = borderWidth;\n        ctx.strokeRect(0, 0, width, height);\n\n        // Draw alert text\n        const alert = currentState.alerts[0];\n        if (alert) {\n            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';\n            ctx.font = 'bold 48px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n            ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n            ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';\n\n            const title = alert.type === 'fall_alert' ? 'FALL DETECTED' :\n                          alert.type === 'anomaly' ? 'ANOMALY' : 'ALERT';\n            const message = formatAlertMessage(alert);\n\n            ctx.fillText(title, width / 2, height / 2 - 30);\n            ctx.font = '24px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n            ctx.fillText(message, width / 2, height / 2 + 30);\n\n            // Draw acknowledge button\n            const buttonWidth = 200;\n            const buttonHeight = 60;\n            const buttonX = (width - buttonWidth) / 2;\n            const buttonY = height / 2 + 80;\n\n            // Button background with glow\n            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${0.9 + pulseIntensity * 0.1})`;\n            ctx.shadowColor = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5)';\n            ctx.shadowBlur = 10;\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.roundRect(buttonX, buttonY, buttonWidth, buttonHeight, 8);\n            ctx.fill();\n            ctx.shadowBlur = 0;\n\n            ctx.fillStyle = '#dc2626';\n            ctx.font = 'bold 20px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n            ctx.fillText('Acknowledge', width / 2, buttonY + buttonHeight / 2);\n        }\n    }\n\n    function formatAlertMessage(alert) {\n        if (alert.type === 'fall_alert') {\n            const person = alert.person || 'Someone';\n            return `${person} has fallen`;\n        } else if (alert.type === 'anomaly') {\n            return 'Unusual activity detected';\n        }\n        return 'Alert detected';\n    }\n\n    function calculateBounds(canvasWidth, canvasHeight) {\n        // Find bounds of all zones\n        if (currentState.zones.length === 0) {\n            // Default bounds - centered square\n            const size = Math.min(canvasWidth, canvasHeight) - config.margin * 2;\n            return {\n                x: (canvasWidth - size) / 2,\n                y: (canvasHeight - size) / 2,\n                width: size,\n                height: size,\n                scale: size / 10, // 10 meters default\n                minX: 0,\n                minY: 0\n            };\n        }\n\n        let minX = Infinity, minY = Infinity;\n        let maxX = -Infinity, maxY = -Infinity;\n\n        currentState.zones.forEach(zone => {\n            const x = zone.x || zone.MinX || 0;\n            const y = zone.y || zone.MinY || 0;\n            const w = zone.w || zone.SizeX || zone.w || 1;\n            const d = zone.d || zone.SizeY || zone.d || 1;\n\n            minX = Math.min(minX, x);\n            minY = Math.min(minY, y);\n            maxX = Math.max(maxX, x + w);\n            maxY = Math.max(maxY, y + d);\n        });\n\n        // Add margin\n        const marginMeters = 1; // 1 meter margin\n        minX -= marginMeters;\n        minY -= marginMeters;\n        maxX += marginMeters;\n        maxY += marginMeters;\n\n        const floorWidth = maxX - minX;\n        const floorHeight = maxY - minY;\n\n        // Calculate scale to fit canvas\n        const scaleX = (canvasWidth - config.margin * 2) / floorWidth;\n        const scaleY = (canvasHeight - config.margin * 2) / floorHeight;\n        const scale = Math.min(scaleX, scaleY, config.scale);\n\n        // Calculate centered bounds\n        const boundsWidth = floorWidth * scale;\n        const boundsHeight = floorHeight * scale;\n        const boundsX = (canvasWidth - boundsWidth) / 2;\n        const boundsY = (canvasHeight - boundsHeight) / 2;\n\n        return {\n            x: boundsX,\n            y: boundsY,\n            width: boundsWidth,\n            height: boundsHeight,\n            scale: scale,\n            minX: minX,\n            minY: minY\n        };\n    }\n\n    function worldToScreen(wx, wy, bounds) {\n        return {\n            x: bounds.x + (wx - bounds.minX) * bounds.scale,\n            y: bounds.y + (wy - bounds.minY) * bounds.scale\n        };\n    }\n\n    function drawZones(ctx, bounds, colors) {\n        currentState.zones.forEach(zone => {\n            const x = zone.x || zone.MinX || 0;\n            const y = zone.y || zone.MinY || 0;\n            const w = zone.w || zone.SizeX || 1;\n            const d = zone.d || zone.SizeY || 1;\n\n            const topLeft = worldToScreen(x, y, bounds);\n            const width = w * bounds.scale;\n            const height = d * bounds.scale;\n\n            // Zone outline (white, 1px stroke)\n            ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff';\n            ctx.lineWidth = 1;\n            ctx.strokeRect(topLeft.x, topLeft.y, width, height);\n\n            // Zone label at centroid\n            const centerX = topLeft.x + width / 2;\n            const centerY = topLeft.y + height / 2;\n\n            const count = zone.count || zone.occupancy || 0;\n            const zoneName = zone.name || zone.Name || 'Zone';\n\n            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';\n            ctx.font = '14px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n            ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n            ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';\n            ctx.fillText(zoneName, centerX, centerY);\n\n            if (count > 0) {\n                ctx.font = '12px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n                ctx.fillText(`(${count})`, centerX, centerY + 16);\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    function drawPortals(ctx, bounds, colors) {\n        if (!currentState.portals || currentState.portals.length === 0) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        ctx.strokeStyle = '#a855f7'; // Purple\n        ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;\n\n        currentState.portals.forEach(portal => {\n            // Portal is defined by two points\n            const p1 = worldToScreen(portal.p1_x || 0, portal.p1_y || 0, bounds);\n            const p2 = worldToScreen(portal.p2_x || 0, portal.p2_y || 0, bounds);\n\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.moveTo(p1.x, p1.y);\n            ctx.lineTo(p2.x, p2.y);\n            ctx.stroke();\n        });\n    }\n\n    function drawNodes(ctx, bounds, colors) {\n        currentState.nodes.forEach(node => {\n            const x = node.pos_x || node.PosX || 0;\n            const y = node.pos_y || node.PosY || 0;\n\n            const pos = worldToScreen(x, y, bounds);\n\n            // Small filled circle (4px radius)\n            ctx.fillStyle = '#6b7280'; // Grey\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n            ctx.fill();\n        });\n    }\n\n    function drawPeople(ctx, bounds, colors) {\n        currentState.blobs.forEach(blob => {\n            // Get current position (with lerp interpolation)\n            let pos = currentPositions.get(blob.id);\n            if (!pos) {\n                pos = { x: blob.x, y: blob.y, z: blob.z || 0 };\n                currentPositions.set(blob.id, pos);\n            }\n\n            // Get target position\n            const target = targetPositions.get(blob.id);\n            if (target) {\n                // Lerp toward target (20% of remaining distance)\n                pos.x = lerp(pos.x, target.x, LERP_FACTOR);\n                pos.y = lerp(pos.y, target.y, LERP_FACTOR);\n                pos.z = lerp(pos.z, target.z, LERP_FACTOR);\n\n                // Update the currentPositions map with the lerped position\n                currentPositions.set(blob.id, { ...pos });\n            }\n\n            const screenPos = worldToScreen(pos.x, pos.y, bounds);\n\n            // Blob radius proportional to identity confidence\n            const confidence = blob.confidence || 0.5;\n            const radius = 10 + (confidence * 8); // 10-18px\n\n            // Get person color\n            let blobColor = '#6b7280'; // Grey for unknown\n            // Handle both person_label (from backend) and person (for consistency)\n            const personName = blob.person_label || blob.person || null;\n            if (personName) {\n                blobColor = getPersonColor(personName);\n            }\n\n            // Draw person blob\n            ctx.fillStyle = blobColor;\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.arc(screenPos.x, screenPos.y, radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n            ctx.fill();\n\n            // Draw name label above\n            const name = personName ? getFirstName(personName) : '?';\n            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';\n            ctx.font = '12px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif';\n            ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n            ctx.fillText(name, screenPos.x, screenPos.y - radius - 4);\n        });\n    }\n\n    function drawSystemStatus(ctx, colors) {\n        const size = 16; // 8px radius = 16px diameter\n        const margin = 16;\n        const x = margin + size / 2;\n        const y = margin + size / 2;\n\n        // Determine status color\n        let statusColor;\n        if (currentState.alerts.length > 0) {\n            statusColor = '#ef4444'; // Red - alert\n        } else {\n            // Check node health\n            const onlineNodes = currentState.nodes.filter(n => n.status === 'online').length;\n            const totalNodes = currentState.nodes.length;\n\n            if (onlineNodes === 0 && totalNodes > 0) {\n                statusColor = '#ef4444'; // Red - all offline\n            } else if (onlineNodes < totalNodes) {\n                statusColor = '#f59e0b'; // Amber - some degraded\n            } else {\n                statusColor = '#22c55e'; // Green - all healthy\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Draw status dot\n        ctx.fillStyle = statusColor;\n        ctx.beginPath();\n        ctx.arc(x, y, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n        ctx.fill();\n    }\n\n    function drawTimeDisplay(ctx, canvasWidth, colors) {\n        const now = new Date();\n        const timeStr = now.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', {\n            hour: 'numeric',\n            minute: '2-digit',\n            hour12: true\n        });\n\n        ctx.fillStyle = colors.text;\n        ctx.font = '28px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, monospace';\n        ctx.textAlign = 'right';\n        ctx.textBaseline = 'top';\n        ctx.fillText(timeStr, canvasWidth - 16, 16);\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Auto-Dim Logic\n    // ============================================\n\n    function resetDimTimer() {\n        if (dimTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(dimTimer);\n        }\n\n        dimTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            enterDimMode();\n        }, AUTO_DIM_TIMEOUT_MS);\n    }\n\n    function enterDimMode() {\n        isDimmed = true;\n        // Reduce canvas brightness to 40%\n        canvas.style.filter = 'brightness(0.4)';\n        canvas.style.transition = 'filter 0.5s ease';\n        console.log('[AmbientRenderer] Entered dim mode');\n    }\n\n    function checkAmbientZonePresence() {\n        if (!config.ambientZone) {\n            return; // No ambient zone configured\n        }\n\n        // Check if anyone is in the ambient zone\n        const zone = currentState.zones.find(z => z.id === config.ambientZone || z.name === config.ambientZone);\n        if (zone && (zone.count > 0 || zone.occupancy > 0)) {\n            // Someone is present - wake from dim\n            if (isDimmed) {\n                AmbientRenderer.wakeFromDim();\n            }\n            // Reset the timer\n            resetDimTimer();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Alert Pulse Animation\n    // ============================================\n\n    function startAlertPulse() {\n        if (alertPulseTimer) {\n            return; // Already running\n        }\n\n        alertPulseTimer = setInterval(() => {\n            alertPulseState = !alertPulseState;\n            // Force immediate render\n            renderFrame();\n        }, ALERT_PULSE_INTERVAL_MS);\n    }\n\n    function stopAlertPulse() {\n        if (alertPulseTimer) {\n            clearInterval(alertPulseTimer);\n            alertPulseTimer = null;\n        }\n        alertPulseState = false;\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Helper Functions\n    // ============================================\n\n    function lerp(start, end, factor) {\n        return start + (end - start) * factor;\n    }\n\n    function getPersonColor(personName) {\n        // Generate consistent color from name\n        let hash = 0;\n        for (let i = 0; i < personName.length; i++) {\n            hash = personName.charCodeAt(i) + ((hash << 5) - hash);\n        }\n        const hue = Math.abs(hash) % 360;\n        return `hsl(${hue}, 70%, 50%)`;\n    }\n\n    function getFirstName(fullName) {\n        if (!fullName) return '?';\n        const parts = fullName.trim().split(/\\s+/);\n        return parts[0];\n    }\n\n    function updateSystemHealth() {\n        if (currentState.alerts.length > 0) {\n            currentState.systemHealth = 'alert';\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const onlineNodes = currentState.nodes.filter(n => n.status === 'online').length;\n        const totalNodes = currentState.nodes.length;\n\n        if (totalNodes === 0) {\n            currentState.systemHealth = 'unknown';\n        } else if (onlineNodes === 0) {\n            currentState.systemHealth = 'offline';\n        } else if (onlineNodes < totalNodes) {\n            currentState.systemHealth = 'degraded';\n        } else {\n            currentState.systemHealth = 'healthy';\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Canvas Interaction\n    // ============================================\n\n    function setupCanvasInteraction() {\n        if (!canvas) return;\n\n        // Handle clicks on canvas (for alert acknowledgment)\n        canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n            const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n            const x = e.clientX - rect.left;\n            const y = e.clientY - rect.top;\n\n            // Check if click is on acknowledge button in alert mode\n            if (currentState.alerts.length > 0) {\n                const width = canvas.width / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);\n                const height = canvas.height / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);\n\n                const buttonWidth = 200;\n                const buttonHeight = 60;\n                const buttonX = (width - buttonWidth) / 2;\n                const buttonY = height / 2 + 80;\n\n                if (x >= buttonX && x <= buttonX + buttonWidth &&\n                    y >= buttonY && y <= buttonY + buttonHeight) {\n                    if (onAlertClick) {\n                        onAlertClick(currentState.alerts[0]);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            // Any click wakes from dim and resets timer\n            wakeFromDim();\n            if (onUserActivity) {\n                onUserActivity();\n            }\n        });\n\n        // Handle touch events\n        canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {\n            wakeFromDim();\n            if (onUserActivity) {\n                onUserActivity();\n            }\n        }, { passive: true });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Export\n    // ============================================\n    window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer = AmbientRenderer;\n\n    console.log('[AmbientRenderer] Module loaded');\n})();\n","numLines":858,"startLine":1,"totalLines":858}}}

    global._activeRafTimers.add(timerId);\n    }\n}\n\n// Start the RAF loop immediately\nstartRafLoop();\n\nglobal.requestAnimationFrame = function(callback) {\n    const id = ++rafIdCounter;\n function() { storage = {}; },\n        get length() { return Object.keys(storage).length; },\n        key: function(index) { return Object.keys(storage)[index] || null; }\n    },\n    writable: true,\n    configurable: true\n});\n\n// Make storage accessible for test cleanup\nglobal._localStorage = storage;\n\n// Track active requestAnimationFrame timers for cleanup\nglobal._activeRafTimers = new Set();\nglobal._stopAllRafTimers = function() {\n    _activeRafTimers.forEach(timerId => clearTimeout(timerId));\n    _activeRafTimers.clear();\n};\n\n// Mock addEventListener and      requestAnimationFrame(resolve);\n        });\n    });\n}\n\nfunction sleep(ms) {\n    return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));\n}\n\n// 1,\n                name: 'Test Zone',\n                x: 1,\n                y: 1,\n                w: 2,  // 3 - 1 = 2 meters wide\n                d: 2,  // 3 - 1 = 2 meters deep\n was drawn\n        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n        const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n        // Check that some white pixels were drawn (zone testIfBriefingAvailable('should appear only once after 6am', async function() {\n        // Mock current time to be after 6am\n        const mockHour = 7; // 7am\n        const originalDate = active\n        // Manually reset isActive by calling dismiss if active\n        window.SpaxelAmbientBriefing.dismiss();\n\n        try {\n            // Show the briefing\n            window.SpaxelAmbientBriefing.show({\n                content: 'Test briefing content'\n            });\n\n            const briefingEl = document.getElementById('ambient-briefing');\n            expect(briefingEl.classList.contains('visible')).toBe(true);\n\n            // Simulate tap/click on dismiss button\n            const dismissBtn = document.getElementById('briefing-dismiss');\n            if (dismissBtn) {\n                dismissBtn.click();\n\n                // Should dismiss immediately\n                expect(briefingEl.classList.contains('visible')).toBe(false);\n            }\n        } finally {\n            Date.prototype.getHours = originalGetHours;\n        }\n    });\n});\n\n// ============================================\n// Lerp Interpolation Tests\n// ============================================\n\ndescribe('AmbientRenderer - Lerp Interpolation', function() {\n    let canvas;\n    let renderer;\n\n    beforeEach(function() {\n        canvas = createTestCanvas();\n    });\n\n    afterEach(function() {\n        if (renderer) {\n            renderer.destroy();\n        }\n        cleanupTestCanvas(canvas);\n    });\n\n    const testIfRendererAvailable = (testName, testFn) => {\n        if (!window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer) {\n            test.skip(testName, () => {});\n        } else {\n            test(testName, testFn);\n        }\n    };\n\n    testIfRendererAvailable('should interpolate position from (1,1) to (3,3)', async function() {\n        renderer = window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer;\n        renderer.init(canvas, {\n            scale: 50,\n            margin: 40\n        });\n\n        // Start position at (1, 1)\n        renderer.updateState({\n            zones: [],\n            blobs: [{\n                id: 1,\n                x: 1,\n                y: 1,\n                z: 0,\n                confidence: 0.8\n            }],\n            portals: [],\n            nodes: []\n        });\n\n        // Wait for one render cycle\n        await sleep(600);\n\n        // Move target to (3, 3)\n        renderer.updateState({\n            zones: [],\n            blobs: [{\n                id: 1,\n                x: 3,\n                y: 3,\n                z: 0,\n                confidence: 0.8\n            }],\n            portals: [],\n            nodes: []\n        });\n\n        // After 5 render frames (5 * 500ms = 2.5 seconds),\n        // position should be approximately at (2.5, 2.5) with 20% lerp\n        // Let's verify the interpolation is working by checking current position\n        const currentPos = renderer._getCurrentPositions && renderer._getCurrentPositions().get(1);\n\n        if (currentPos) {\n            // Position should have moved from (1, 1) toward (3, 3)\n            expect(currentPos.x).toBeGreaterThan(1);\n            expect(currentPos.y).toBeGreaterThan(1);\n            expect(currentPos.x).toBeLessThan(3);\n            expect(currentPos.y).toBeLessThan(3);\n        }\n    });\n\n    testIfRendererAvailable('should use 20% lerp factor per frame', function() {\n        renderer = window.SpaxelAmbientRenderer;\n        renderer.init(canvas, {\n            scale: 50,\n            margin: 40\n        });\n\n        // Set initial position via updateState (this sets both current and target)\n        renderer.updateState({\n            zones: [],\n            blobs: [{\n                id: 1,\n                x: 1,\n                y: 1,\n                z: 0,\n                confidence: 0.8\n            }],\n            portals: [],\n            nodes: []\n        });\n\n        // Now update target to (3, 3)\n        renderer.updateState({\n            zones: [],\n            blobs: [{\n                id: 1,\n                x: 3,\n                y: 3,\n                z: 0,\n                confidence: 0.8\n            }],\n            portals: [],\n            nodes: []\n        });\n\n        // Trigger one render (which performs lerp)\n        renderer.render();\n\n        // After one frame with 20% lerp:\n        // x = 1 + 0.2 * (3 - 1) = 1 + 0.4 = 1.4\n        // y = 1 + 0.2 * (3 - 1) = 1 + 0.4 = 1.4\n        const currentPos = renderer._getCurrentPositions && renderer._getCurrentPositions().get(1);\n\n        // Log actual values for debugging\n        if (currentPos) {\n            console.log('Actual position after lerp:', currentPos.x, currentPos.y);\n            // Verify the position has moved from initial (1,1) toward target (3,3)\n            expect(currentPos.x).toBeGreaterThan(1);\n            expect(currentPos.y).toBeGreaterThan(1);\n            expect(currentPos.x).toBeLessThan(3);\n            expect(currentPos.y).toBeLessThan(3);\n        } else {\n            fail('currentPos is undefined');\n        }\n    });\n});\n\n// ============================================\n// Time-of-Day Palette Tests\n// ============================================\n\ndescribe('AmbientMode - (!window.SpaxelAmbientMode) {\n            test.skip(testName, () => {});\n        } else {\n            test(testName, testFn);\n        }\n    };\n\n    testIfModeAvailable('should use morning // Clean up\n            window.SpaxelAmbientMode.disable();\n        } finally {\n            Date.prototype.getHours = originalGetHours;\n        }\n    });\n\n    testIfModeAvailable('should use day palette (10am-6pm)', function() {\n        // Mock hour to 2pm\n        const originalGetHours = Date.prototype.getHours;\n        Date.prototype.getHours = function() { return 14; };\n\n        try {\n            window.SpaxelAmbientMode.enable();\n\n            expect(document.body.classList.contains('time-day')).toBe(true);\n        } finally {\n            Date.prototype.getHours = originalGetHours;\n            window.SpaxelAmbientMode.disable();\n        }\n    });\n\n    testIfModeAvailable('should use evening palette (6-10pm)', function() {\n        // Mock hour to 7pm\n     }\n    });\n\n    testIfModeAvailable('should use night palette (10pm-6am)', function() {\n        // Mock hour to 11pm\n        const originalGetHours = Date.prototype.getHours;\n        Date.prototype.getHours = function() { return 23; };\n\n        try {\n            window.SpaxelAmbientMode.enable();\n\n
